What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a red hooded sweatshirt and black gloves holds a tattoo machine while working on another person's hand. Nearby, an individual in a light grey hoodie and black baseball cap holds a phone to their ear. A black rolling tool chest with stickers sits beside them, topped with ink bottles and a roll of white paper towels. A bright circular light source illuminates the work area from behind the artist.
